creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 191170
Log file of synth build

building the port with synth yields the error below:

checking for library containing ldap_initialize... no
configure: error: in `/construction/xports/net/isc-dhcp44-server/work/dhcp-4.4.1':
configure: error: *** Cannot find ldap_initialize with -lldap - do you need to install an OpenLDAP2 Devel package?
See `config.log' for more details
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to zi@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/construction/xports/net/isc-dhcp44-server/work/dhcp-4.4.1/config.log"
including the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be
a good idea to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system
(e.g. a /usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /xports/net/isc-dhcp44-server
